across.clue: to praise someone in order to get something you want especially in a way that is not sincere.
An ability to know or understand something through your feelings rather than by considering facts or evidence.

a limited amount of something especially food that you are allowed to have for example when there is not much available or when someone else is controlling it.
a short or temporary period when you fail or forget to do things in the right way.

down.clue: to make someone or something seem less valuable or respected
something that has been badly damaged
to measure or describe something as a quantity.
